order update?

Covercraft: Thanks for your patience as you wait for your order. Can you please also check if you received a confirmation email or a charge on your account? Be sure to check your spam and promo folders for the email as well.
I did

Covercraft: I'm sorry you're having trouble with your order. Upon checking, I couldn't find any active orders on my end.

Additionally, have you had a chance to check your account to see if the charge is pending or has gone through successfully? Let me know if you find anything. If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to let me know. I'm here to help!

You'll receive tracking information via email as soon as your order ships. Be sure to check your spam and promo folders, as sometimes our emails end up there. Rest assured that we're doing our best to get it delivered as soon as possible.

browsingHistory.item: Large Le Plein - White Classic / Blush
Le Duo Magnifique - Black Classic / Red

escalate: ESC if cx wants their account name to be changed
ESC if cx complains that their order was canceled
If cx's ask when their order will arrive/estimated delivery date
➜  Ask what shipping method they selected at checkout
➜ If it's standard shipping use STS shortcut
➜ If they insist to know exactly when ESC
Cx gets a code for free shipping for the first purchase; you can escalate any issues after troubleshooting
tone: Don't thank the cx for the purchase, thank them for their continuous support
Don't ask the customer to contact the courier
drive_to_purchase: Don't D2P when the cx already made a purchase
promo_and_exclusions: Free shipping code is only valid for standard shipping
Standard shipping charge is usually ~ $20, if you see a charge higher than that, it means the method selected is NOT standard (create a mock cart to double-check)

Translated: Good evening, I want to write to cancel the order I had made for the rose..
Template used: "Cancel / edit order "; last updated: 2022-08-01 21:04:35.106

Venus et Fleur: Thank you for reaching out. I'm sorry for the inconvenience. As indicated during the checkout process, once an order has been submitted, we are unable to make any changes or updates to the order. Due to the custom nature of our products, all sales are final. Please note we process orders almost as soon as they're placed on our website to ensure timely delivery, particularly for rush orders or upcoming holidays. I'm sorry we couldn't be of more help. If you believe that there is any information on the order that might compromise delivery, please call us at 800-808-9830 as soon as possible. We'll do our best to try to address the situation! 

Please let me know if you need anything else. I'm here to help!

Yea I need to know when my order is going to ship that I ordered on Sunday. Tried emailing twice with no response and then called customer service, was on hold for 15 minutes both times, and then the phone hangs up. If it isn't going to be here by Saturday, I want it cancelled

Banded: I'm sorry about that. That's not the type of experience we aim for. I just checked the order 557310 and I'm afraid it hasn't shipped yet. Did you email us directly at info@banded.com? Yes that's the email I used. So can it be overnighted so I can get it by Saturday? If not, I'll just return whenever it gets here.

Banded: Thanks for the screenshot and I'm sorry about that. Unfortunately, I'm not able to guarantee that it can be overnighted, as the best way to handle this is to reach out to our team. You can give us a call at 1-800-333-5119 Monday-Friday, from 8 am to 5 pm CST. You can also email us directly at info@banded.com. Our team is happy to help!
 
However, since you've already sent us an email then please rest assured that your inquiry is in the queue and someone will reach out to you the moment they are available.

Kitsch: If you'd like to be connected to our dedicated product concierge, reply KATIE. For questions about your order, reply SUPPORT to be connected with our customer service team. Text STOP to opt out.
There is nothing called labubu ... (which this stupid phone changed to panini 3+ times LOL. I am pretty sure you also don't sell paninis)
Kitsch: Hey, this is Katie, how can I help you?

Hi! My initial question is I got a message about something called "labubu". I had no clue what it was. Apparently the search feature on your sight doesn't either. (And my horrible phone changed it to Panini at least 3 times. I doubt you sell those either)
My next question is when can I expect my order that I placed at least a week ago? Is there tracking info somewhere?

Kitsch: I'm sorry for the mix-up. Unfortunately, we currently don't have them on our website. Our search bar is designed to provide general information based on the terms entered. Feedback from our customers is really valuable and helps us constantly improve! I'll definitely pass this along to the team for future consideration. Thank you for your feedback.

Regarding your order, unfortunately, I don't see any other posted orders on my end aside from your order #8173724. Could you please check if you received a confirmation email or if there's a charge on your account? Also, be sure to check your spam and promo folders for the email.
What email address do you have for me?
I believe the amount had been deducted from my account. I was working with Jessica and I thought we got it thru.
It's not in the shopping cart any more. I believe the total was $38.95
Here is a copy from my bank statement
I guess it took a few days before it posted to my account.
I just looked on my conversation with Jessica and it processed last Sunday at your end. I will check a calendar for the date.
7/27. So the order went thru your end on 7/27 and was withdrawn & posted from my only account on 7/28.

Kitsch: I understand. Thank you for the details. I'm sorry, but I don't have access to the order you recently placed, so I cannot see which email was used. Kindly check the email you provided when Jessica placed your order, including your spam and promo folders, to see if you can find the order number. You can then use our convenient online tool to check the latest updates on your order: https://mykitsch.attn.tv/a5y0YKQM6zrs

Please also note that our processing time takes 2 business days and we usually ship via FedEx and DHL. Once shipped it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders and 2 weeks for international orders.
I do my best to NEVER use email. I have 3 addresses. One has 90,000, one has 17,000 and the one that is only 4 months old already has 7,000

The one email has TWO EMAILS FROM KITSCH. 

They BOTH are from today and just like the text message they are talking about "labubus"

That address is:
18reed.mayo@icloud.com

Kitsch: I apologize for the inconvenience this has caused, and I appreciate you providing additional information. I'd like to check this with our specialized team. Could you please also confirm the complete shipping address and the full name on the order so we can locate it?

Regarding your concern about the freebie, Labubu is a collectible art toy figure, often part of limited-edition drops and collaborations. At the moment, it's not available to view on our website, but I'll be sure to share your feedback with our team so they can consider adding more details. 

In the meantime, if you'd like to get a visual of what Labubu looks like, I recommend doing a quick search on Google or Safari. You should be able to find plenty of images and info.

Thanks. I will search.

Here is my info:
Paula Jennings
2040 Elvira Street
Apt #209
Fayetteville, NC 28303

I checked 2 other email addresses which are both Gmail & which they INSISTED on combining. 

Paulajen416@gmail.com

Paulajennings28303@gmail.com

The first one is the one that got 90,000 in one day when Covid arrived in Delaware in Feb 2020. The other is an address that was started a few months ago but Gmail insists on combining them which was NOT MY INTENT and obviously has caused more difficulty than benefit.
Going to search now!
This is what the search brings up! lol.
This is the message I got. And the link takes me to your website.
How can I use that link to check on the order if I have no order number?
The number you gave me was from my first order which arrived on 5/31 and I am VERY HAPPY WITH!

Kitsch: I'm truly sorry for all the confusion. Please disregard the text about Labubu. It is simply a marketing alert letting you know that we are giving away free Labubu figures with random orders throughout August. The search bar on our website will not display it, as it is mainly used for finding products we currently sell.

Also, I'm glad to hear that you're happy with your previous order.

Lastly, I see you already have the details for the order you placed with Jessica. Based on the screenshot you provided, it is expected to arrive tomorrow, August 2.

That is what I saw too but when I tried to track it to make sure the instructions specify that it must be brought INSIDE THE BUILDING and I can't see the tracking info just the date. Who is delivering it USPS? UPS? FedEx?
They all behave differently. I had a coat coming from Temu and the driver left it OUTSIDE the building door where it was promptly stolen.
Kitsch: Sorry to hear about your past experiences with the couriers. I have limited access on my end, but I already escalated the case and I will be back with more info soon.
